en: While exact details of the story are contested, it's rumored that the pill, however,
froze to the freezer coils and broke,
foiling the CIA's plan and granting Castro many more days to satiate his sweet tooth.
ko: CIA의 계획을 저지하며 카스트로에게 더 많은 시간을 주었다.

en: Ice cream has held a unique role in our world's history, culture, and cravings.
ko: 아이스크림은 우리 세계 역사에서 독특한 역할을 해왔다,

en: But where did it come from? The first accounts of cold desserts and iced drinks
date back as early as the first century.
In civilizations including ancient Rome, Mughal India, and Tang Dynasty China,
ko: 고대 로마, 무굴 제국, 당나라 중국을 포함한 문명에서,

en: these icy treats were mainly enjoyed by the royal elites.
ko: 이러한 진미를 얼릴 방법을 찾는 것은

en: And finding the means to freeze these delicacies wasn't always easy.
Wealthy Mediterranean nobility sent laborers to trek up high mountains
to harvest glacial ice and snow.
Meanwhile, ancient Persians built shallow insulated pools of water
and utilized a technique known as sky cooling.
At night, the shallow pools would naturally radiate heat into the dry desert skies,
ko: 밤에는 얕은 수조가 자연스럽게 열을 방출하여
